THIS WEEK IN OUR CLASSROOM. We are finishing our pollinator project, choosing book-club questions and preparing for Friday’s sharing circle.

Today’s classroom schedule

Check in, share a win and set a learning goal.

Use fraction models to plan our garden beds.

ProjectFinish one pollinator fact for your poster.
